title: abarema subcoriacea
intro: Abarema subcoriacea, also known as the White Katala, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Abarema subcoriacea include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Abarema subcoriacea are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
